title: Finalize cumulative governance archive budget for release truth
rawUserRequest: 继续执行计划；对已识别的累计 archiveGrowth 预算不足创建独立最终预算修复 Work Item/PR，覆盖预算修复自身和原预算 PR 的归档，不启动工单 1 之外的工作。
outOfScope: 工单 1 实现和执行计划内容
任何生产行为或发布流程变更

sources.reason: 当前累计 archiveGrowth 预算和 repaymentRecords。
预算修复归档后 archiveGrowth=431 exceeds maximum 430；随后原预算 PR 仍需归档，最终预检值为 432。

riskAssessment.reason: 仅调整已授权的 archiveGrowth 上限和偿还记录，不修改工单 1 或生产行为。

executionDecision.reason: 用户已授权独立预算修复，并要求按完整生命周期继续。

preReviewWarnings: Verify archiveGrowth=432 covers both budget-remediation archives and the pending original budget PR archive.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The confirmed archiveGrowth ceiling is 432 and admits the two budget-remediation archives plus the original budget PR archive.
The increase carries an explicit repayment record and this PR changes no plan content or production behavior.
All declared AI and project checks pass.

declaredIntent.summary: Finalize the cumulative archive-growth budget before retrying the original budget PR and One Release Truth Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Cumulative archive growth reaches 432 after both remediation archives and the original budget PR archive
No Work Item 1 or plan content enters this final budget PR

guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: PR #217 的 CI 证明预算修复自身新增归档后 archiveGrowth=431，超过已确认上限 430；原预算 PR 仍需要自己的归档记录，因此最终累计值应预先校准到 432。
constraints: 只修改治理复杂度预算和 repaymentRecords。
不修改工单 1、执行计划或生产行为。
预算必须以可复核的累计归档测量为依据。
intent.rationale: 把所有已授权预算修复的归档增长一次性计入，避免再次循环创建同类预算修复。

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: 用户已授权独立预算修复 Work Item/PR 并要求继续完整执行。

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
